objective: Replace this with one concrete sprint objective.
blocking_rule: If any required input or contract field is ambiguous, stop and write BLOCKED instead of guessing.
in_scope: Replace with one allowed delivery item.
out_of_scope: Replace with one explicit forbidden item.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Replace with one verifiable acceptance criterion.
required_evidence: Replace with one concrete file, API, or command proof.

work_units.title: Replace with one focused unit title.
work_units.objective: Replace with one concrete deliverable for this unit.
required_evidence: Replace with one concrete evidence output for this unit.

evaluator_checks: Changed files stayed within touched paths.
Every acceptance criterion has concrete evidence.
